summary: Script uses `set -euo pipefail`, quoted vars, and error handling via die() function. However, numeric argument validation missing (--max-age-days etc not checked), CSV parsing doesn't handle edge cases (quoted fields, escapes), and parallel array pattern (ART_NAME[i], ART_SIZE[i], etc) is fragile and couples policies to array indexing. DECISION[i]="DELETE:age" mixes concern with reason. Workflow has unnecessary apt-get|sudo fallback (runners are root). Lines ~90-180 repeat `for ((i=0; i<COUNT; i++))` 8+ times without factoring. REFERENCE_DATE in production code (lines ~26, 65-68) is testing infrastructure leakage. Integration test hard-codes deletion counts (lines ~151-156), coupling it to implementation details. Missing: CSV format validation, numeric type checks, structured output for reliable test assertions.
